## Description

Provide a clear summary of the changes introduced by this PR and specify which module file it modifies (e.g., `js/Config.js`, `js/Food.js`).

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Optimization / Refactoring (cleaner code implementation)
- [ ] Documentation update (`README.md`, comments)

## How Has This Been Tested?

Please describe the verification tests conducted to check behavior across viewports:

- [ ] Tested via keyboard inputs (Desktop)
- [ ] Tested via touch inputs (Mobile viewports)
- [ ] Tested via gamepad (if applicable)

## Checklist:

- [ ] My code follows the modular style of this repository.
- [ ] All adjustable parameters are in `js/Config.js` (if applicable).
- [ ] I have verified my changes do not trigger console errors or disrupt the core game loop.
- [ ] My changes remain responsive across desktop and mobile layouts.
